title: empodium elongatum
intro: Empodium elongatum, also known as the yellow grass lily or grass-leaved lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asparagaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Empodium elongatum is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and digestive disorders, offering benefits such as relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for consumption, and its roots can also be used to make a poultice for topical application.
